[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A gray and black tabby cat’s face emerges from behind a yellow, mitten-like shape on a plain white background.

Main Subject:
A cat with a gray and black striped coat is shown in close-up, with its head and upper face visible, while the lower part of the image is covered by a large yellow shape.

Setting:
The background is a plain white field with no other visible environment. The image appears to be a simple, centered composition.

Visual Details:
The cat’s fur is short and patterned with darker stripes and a lighter gray face; it has triangular ears, and its eyes appear partially closed or narrowed. The yellow shape in the foreground resembles a hand or mitten-like form with a rounded top and a finger-like segment extending upward on the left side. The cat is positioned slightly to the right of center, with its head facing forward. The lighting appears flat and even, with minimal shadows.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up of a gray tabby cat’s face against a plain white background. A large yellow hand-like graphic covers the lower portion of the cat.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
